Re Ntc And Motion For Costs Including Attys Fees

MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BRODERICK BYERS' MOTION FOR COSTS INCLUDING ATTORNEY'S FEES is denied.
